creator: anarcat@lethe.koumbit.net
text:
This is to note that I have upgraded the LedgerSMB port.

Fix: Note: this patch is against port 1.2.11, which I had in my archives here. I have no idea how I managed to get into this situation, but the change for 1.2.12 should be fairly trivial.

If this patch is not adequate, I'll be happy to reissue it.

Thanks,
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A.
